水力锯木厂: 一座由直接水源或引水渠出口驱动的大型固定水力锯木厂。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Placement: River environments only via blueprint conditions. Operation: Load a log into the sawmill, then press Cut to saw it into planks.
水力锯木厂: 放置： 仅限通过蓝图条件在河流环境中放置。 操作： 将木料装入锯木厂，然后按切割将其锯成木板。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Pack up the sawmill back into a transportable kit.
水力锯木厂: 将锯木厂收回为可携带套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Saw one log from the inventory into planks using water power.
水力锯木厂: 利用水力将库存中的一根木料锯成木板。

水力锯木厂: 用于将水流引导至水力机械的渠道段。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use: Build directional between-location races and install local mill race structures.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 建造地点间定向引水渠并安装本地引水渠结构。

水力锯木厂: 由河流驱动的水车组件。需要引水渠作为必要子组件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Subcomponent: The mill race is required to build this wheel.
水力锯木厂: 子组件： 建造此水车需要引水渠。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A water-driven mill that grinds millable materials on demand with 4x the capacity of a rotary quern.
水力锯木厂: 按需研磨可磨材料的水力磨坊，容量是旋转石磨的4倍。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Subcomponent: Requires a mill race to construct. Capacity: Can grind 4x the throughput of a manual rotary quern. Operation: Load millable items and press Grind All to process the batch on demand.
水力锯木厂: 子组件： 建造需要引水渠。 容量： 吞吐量是手动旋转石磨的4倍。 操作： 装入可磨物品后按全部研磨批量处理。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Build a wooden mill race segment used for water channels.
水力锯木厂: 建造用于水渠的木制引水渠段。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Assemble a large water wheel for power generation.
水力锯木厂: 组装用于发电的大型水车。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Assemble a compact water mill. Requires a mill race as a core subcomponent.
水力锯木厂: 组装紧凑型水力磨坊。需要引水渠作为核心子组件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Build a large forge in 4 phases: (1) Water mill and excavation, (2) Stone foundation and mud brick structure, (3) Fire chamber with leather bellows, (4) Final plaster, iron fittings, bearings, and axle. Total construction time: 12 hours (3 hours per phase).
水力锯木厂: 分4阶段建造大型锻炉：(1)水力磨坊和挖掘，(2)石质地基和泥砖结构，(3)带皮风箱的火膛，(4)最终抹灰、铁制配件、轴承和铁轴。总建造时间：12小时（每阶段3小时）。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Start with a water-driven sawmill kit ready to place near water or a connected mill race outlet.

A complete forge kit with all components for a large water-powered metalworking forge, including iron fittings, bearings, and an axle.
水力锯木厂: 包含大型水力锻炉所有组件的完整套件，包括铁制配件、轴承和铁轴。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use: Place near water or a connected mill race outlet to set up the forge. Scale: This is a large construction project requiring water power, iron parts, bearings, and an axle.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近建立锻炉。 规模： 这是一个需要水力、铁制零件、轴承和铁轴的大型建造项目。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Place the forge kit into the environment.
水力锯木厂: 将锻炉套件放置在环境中。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Break down the kit into its component parts.

A bundled upgrade kit combining the water-driven forge, mill drive, forge hammer, iron reinforcements, bearing and axle support, an iron workshop wrench, charcoal reserve, and gear train for heavy metalworking.
水力锯木厂: 集水力锻炉、磨坊驱动装置、锻锤、铁制加固件、轴承和铁轴支撑、铁制工坊扳手、木炭储备和齿轮系于一体的重型金属加工升级套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Purpose: A bundled upgrade kit for extending the water-driven forge into a workshop. Contents: Water-driven forge kit, water mill, forge hammer, iron parts, iron bearings, iron axle, iron wrench, charcoal, and copper gears.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 将水力锻炉升级扩展为工坊的捆绑套件。 内容： 水力锻炉套件、水力磨坊、锻锤、铁制零件、铁轴承、铁轴、铁扳手、木炭和铜齿轮。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Break down the workshop kit into its component parts.
水力锯木厂: 将工坊套件拆解为各组件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A large water-powered forge for high-temperature metalworking
column5: 用于高温金属加工、铜冶炼和烧陶的大型水力锻炉。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Requirements: Requires local mill race for water power. Water-powered actions stop when water is frozen in winter. Operation: Drag firewood or charcoal onto the forge to feed fuel, then light it with embers. The forge naturally heats to about 1000. Use Blast when water is flowing, or drag Bellows onto the lit forge by hand, to push the temperature high enough for smelting. You can also place metal nuggets and clay items in the inventory.
水力锯木厂: 需求： 需要本地引水渠提供水力。冬季水流冻结时，水力动作会停止。 操作： 将柴火或木炭拖至锻炉补充燃料，然后用余烬点火。锻炉会自然升温至约1000。水流畅通时可使用鼓风，或手动将风箱拖到已点燃的锻炉上，将温度推高到足以冶炼。也可在库存中放入金属块和陶土物品。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Feed wood or firewood into the forge firebox.
水力锯木厂: 向锻炉火膛中投入木材或柴火。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Feed firewood or other fuel into the forge firebox.
水力锯木厂: 向锻炉火膛中投入柴火或其他燃料。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Feed charcoal or embers into the forge firebox.
水力锯木厂: 向锻炉火膛中投入木炭或余烬。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Pack up the forge back into a transportable kit.
水力锯木厂: 将锻炉收回为可携带套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use lit tinder to light the forge fire.
水力锯木厂: 用点燃的火绒点燃锻炉。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Feed hot embers into the forge firebox.
水力锯木厂: 向锻炉火膛中投入热余烬。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use bellows by hand to push the forge above natural heat.
水力锯木厂: 手动使用风箱将锻炉温度推高到自然热量以上。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Drive the water-powered bellows to push the forge to smelting heat. Requires fuel
column5: 驱动水力风箱使锻炉升至冶炼温度。需要燃料、已点燃的火焰和流动水源。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Apply one hammer strike to all items in the forge using the water-driven hammer. Requires flowing water.
水力锯木厂: 使用水力锤对锻炉中的所有物品施加一次锤击。需要流动水源。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Forge must be at working heat. Use Blast or Bellows first.
水力锯木厂: 锻炉必须达到工作温度。请先使用鼓风或风箱。

Water-Driven Sawmill: The forge is not hot enough. Use Blast or Bellows first.
水力锯木厂: 锻炉温度不够高。请先使用鼓风或风箱。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Drag copper ore onto the hot forge to smelt it into an ingot.
水力锯木厂: 将铜矿拖至热锻炉冶炼成铜锭。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A complete grinding mill kit with all components for a large water-powered grain mill, including iron bearing and axle hardware.
水力锯木厂: 包含大型水力谷物磨所有组件的完整套件，包括铁轴承和铁轴五金。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use: Place near water or a connected mill race outlet to set up the grinding mill. Scale: This is a large construction project requiring water power, an iron bearing, and an iron axle.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近建立磨坊。 规模： 这是一个需要水力、铁轴承和铁轴的大型建造项目。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Place the grinding mill kit into the environment.
水力锯木厂: 将磨坊套件放置在环境中。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Break down the kit into its component parts.
A large water-powered grinding mill for batch processing millable materials.
水力锯木厂: 用于批量处理可磨材料的大型水力磨坊。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Requirements: Requires local mill race for water power. Operation: Load millable items, then press Grind All to process the full batch on demand, like a larger rotary quern.
水力锯木厂: 需求： 需要本地引水渠提供水力。 操作： 装入可磨物品，然后按全部研磨按需批量处理，相当于更大的旋转石磨。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Pack up the grinding mill back into a transportable kit.
水力锯木厂: 将磨坊收回为可携带套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Engage the mill wheel and process all millable contents in one batch.
水力锯木厂: 启动磨轮，一次批量处理所有可磨内容物。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Assemble a water-driven grinding mill. Requires a water mill, iron bearing, and iron axle as core subcomponents.
水力锯木厂: 组装水力磨坊。需要水力磨坊、铁轴承和铁轴作为核心子组件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A heavy wrought iron wrench sized for tightening the workshop's hammer and drive assemblies.
水力锯木厂: 一把沉重的熟铁扳手，用于拧紧工坊锻锤与传动机构。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Purpose: Forged workshop tool used when assembling a water-driven workshop kit.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 组装水力工坊套件时使用的锻造工坊工具。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Forge one heavy iron wrench from a wrought iron bar.
水力锯木厂: 用一根熟铁条锻造一把沉重的铁扳手。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Upgrade a completed water-driven forge kit with a water mill, forge hammer, iron parts, iron bearings, an iron axle, an iron wrench, charcoal, and copper gears into a workshop kit.
水力锯木厂: 将完成的水力锻炉套件与水力磨坊、锻锤、铁制零件、铁轴承、铁轴、铁扳手、木炭和铜齿轮升级为工坊套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Start with a water-driven forge kit and mill race component. Place near water or a connected mill race outlet to build a water-powered metalworking station.
水力锯木厂: 携带水力锻炉套件和引水渠组件开始游戏。放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近以建造水力金属加工站。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Start with a grinding mill kit and mill race component. Place near water or a connected mill race outlet to build a water-powered grain mill.
水力锯木厂: 携带磨坊套件和引水渠组件开始游戏。放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近以建造水力谷物磨。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A complete ore sluice kit with iron bearing and axle hardware, ready to be placed near water or a connected mill race outlet for mineral prospecting.
水力锯木厂: 带有铁轴承和铁轴五金的完整矿石淘洗槽套件，可放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近用于矿物勘探。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use: Place near water or a connected mill race outlet to set up the ore sluice. Purpose: Wash soil to extract greenstone nuggets. Requires iron bearing and axle hardware.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近建立矿石淘洗槽。 目的： 冲洗土壤以提取绿石块。需要铁轴承和铁轴五金。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Place the ore sluice kit into the environment.
水力锯木厂: 将矿石淘洗槽套件放置在环境中。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Break down the sluice kit into its component parts.
水力锯木厂: 将淘洗槽套件拆解为各组件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A water-powered sluice box for washing soil and separating mineral deposits. Load mud piles, dirt piles, or fine dirt, then run the sluice to process them for greenstone, flint, stone, and occasionally metal nuggets.
水力锯木厂: 用于冲洗土壤和分离矿物沉积物的水力淘洗槽。装入泥堆、污土堆或细沙土后运行淘洗槽以提取绿石、燧石、石头和偶尔的金属矿块。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Requirements: Requires a local mill race for water power. Operation: Load mud piles, dirt piles, or fine dirt into the sluice, then press Sluice All. Each drop is rolled independently — a single pile can yield multiple items or nothing. Drop chances (Mud / Dirt / Fine Dirt): Iron Nugget: 8% / 5% / 1% Copper Nugget: 12% / 8% / 1% Tin Nugget: 8% / 5% / 1% Greenstone: 22% / 18% / 12% Flint: 30% / 20% / 10% Stone: 55% / 40% / 10% Clay: 10% / 20% / 55% Nuggets spawn at 35% quality.
水力锯木厂: 需求： 需要本地引水渠提供水力。 操作： 将泥堆、污土堆或细沙土装入淘洗槽，然后按全部淘洗。每种产出独立掷骰——单个土堆可产出多件物品或无产出。 掉落概率（泥堆 / 污土堆 / 细沙土）： 铁矿块：8% / 5% / 1% 铜矿块：12% / 8% / 1% 锡矿块：8% / 5% / 1% 绿石：22% / 18% / 12% 燧石：30% / 20% / 10% 石头：55% / 40% / 10% 黏土：10% / 20% / 55% 矿块以35%品质产出。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Run water through the sluice to wash all loaded soil. Each item yields minerals or a rare metal nugget.
水力锯木厂: 引水通过淘洗槽冲洗所有装载的土壤。每件物品可产出矿物或稀有金属矿块。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Pack up the ore sluice back into a transportable kit.
水力锯木厂: 将矿石淘洗槽收回为可携带套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Build a water-powered ore sluice for washing soil and extracting greenstone. Requires direct water or a connected mill race outlet. Uses heavy stones as ballast.
水力锯木厂: 建造水力矿石淘洗槽，用于冲洗土壤和提取绿石。需要直接水源或引水渠出口。使用大石块作压舱石。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Break down the mill race and recover the planks.
水力锯木厂: 拆除引水渠并回收木板。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Disassemble the water wheel into its wooden frame, stonework, and gear.
水力锯木厂: 将水车拆解为木框架、石工和齿轮。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Break down the water mill into its wheel, race, and drive gear.
水力锯木厂: 将水力磨坊拆解为水轮、引水渠和驱动齿轮。

Water-Driven Sawmill: An unfinished sluice box frame. Needs rope and a mill race connection to become a working ore sluice.
水力锯木厂: 未完工的淘洗槽框架。需要绳索和引水渠连接才能成为可用的矿石淘洗槽。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use: Combine with rope and a mill race in the Ore Sluice blueprint to finish construction.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 在矿石淘洗槽蓝图中与绳索和引水渠结合以完成建造。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Break down the sluice frame and recover planks.
水力锯木厂: 拆除淘洗槽框架并回收木板。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Hammer together a basic sluice box frame from planks and copper nails.
水力锯木厂: 用木板和铜钉锤制基础淘洗槽框架。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Dig a fishpond near water or a connected mill race outlet in 5 stages (3 hours each, 15 hours total): 3 digging stages with a shovel, then 2 stocking stages with live fish and planks. Fish will grow over time. When the total fish count exceeds 10, the pond becomes stocked and frogs can be caught. The pond freezes in winter.
水力锯木厂: 在水源旁或引水渠出口附近分5阶段挖掘鱼塘（每阶段3小时，共15小时）：3个挖掘阶段（需铲子），然后2个放鱼阶段（需活鱼和木板）。鱼会随时间增长。当总鱼数超过10条时，鱼塘变为满载状态，可捕捉青蛙。鱼塘在冬天结冰。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A pre-stocked fishpond kit ready for placement near water or a connected mill race outlet. Fish populations grow slowly over time.
水力锯木厂: 预先放鱼的鱼塘套件，可放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近。鱼群数量随时间缓慢增长。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Use: Place near water or a connected mill race outlet. Fish grow over time. The pond becomes stocked when the total fish count exceeds 10. Fish are caught with a spear.
水力锯木厂: 用途： 放置在水源旁或引水渠出口附近。鱼会随时间增长。当总鱼数超过10条时鱼塘变为满载状态。用标枪捕鱼。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Place the fishpond near the river.
Break down the kit and recover most of the planks and rope.
水力锯木厂: 拆解套件并回收大部分木板和绳索。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A working fishpond with a small population of pike, perch, and minnow. Only those three breed; trout, char, and sturgeon can be stocked separately but do not breed. Once the breeding population exceeds 10 the pond becomes a fully Stocked Fishpond.
水力锯木厂: 一个有少量狗鱼、鲈鱼和小鱼的运作鱼塘。只有这三种鱼繁殖；鳟鱼、鲑鱼和鲟鱼可单独放养但不繁殖。繁殖种群超过10条后鱼塘变为满载鱼塘。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Populations: Pike, perch, and minnow each grow at the same slow rate (~2 days per fish per species). Trout / Char / Sturgeon: Each tracked separately (cap 10 each). They do not breed. Catch: Use a spear to catch one fish at a time. Each catch reduces that species' population by 1. Stocked Threshold: When the breeding population (pike+perch+minnow) exceeds 10, the pond transitions to Stocked and frogs can be caught. Water Draw: Drag a water container in to fill it with unsafe water (boil before drinking). Winter: The pond freezes when winter sets in and only ice fishing is available.
水力锯木厂: 种群： 狗鱼、鲈鱼和小鱼各自以相同的缓慢速度增长（每种每条约2天）。 鳟鱼/鲑鱼/鲟鱼： 各自单独追踪（上限各10条）。不繁殖。 捕捞： 用标枪每次捕捞一条鱼。每次捕捞使该物种数量减少1。 满载阈值： 繁殖种群（狗鱼+鲈鱼+小鱼）超过10条时，鱼塘转为满载状态，可捕捉青蛙。 取水： 拖入水容器以汲取不安全的水（饮用前需煮沸）。 冬季： 冬季来临时鱼塘结冰，只能冰钓。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Spear a pike from the pond.
水力锯木厂: 用标枪从鱼塘捕捞一条狗鱼。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Spear a perch from the pond.
水力锯木厂: 用标枪从鱼塘捕捞一条鲈鱼。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Spear a minnow from the pond.
水力锯木厂: 用标枪从鱼塘捕捞一条小鱼。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Draw unsafe water from the pond into a container. Boil before drinking.
水力锯木厂: 从鱼塘汲取不安全的水装入容器。饮用前需煮沸。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Abandon the fish and drain the pond back to a fishpond kit.
水力锯木厂: 放弃鱼群，将鱼塘排水还原为鱼塘套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A mature fishpond rich with pike, perch, and minnow. Trout, char, and sturgeon can also be stocked but do not breed. The thriving ecosystem also attracts frogs to the water's edge.
水力锯木厂: 一个富含狗鱼、鲈鱼和小鱼的成熟鱼塘。鳟鱼、鲑鱼和鲟鱼也可放养但不繁殖。繁盛的生态系统也会吸引青蛙来到水边。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Populations: Pike, perch, and minnow continue to grow at the same slow rate. Trout / Char / Sturgeon: Each tracked separately (cap 10 each). They do not breed. Catch: Use a spear to catch one fish at a time. Each catch reduces that species' population by 1. Frogs: The Catch Frog action is available while the pond is Stocked (no spear required). Reverts: If the breeding population (pike+perch+minnow) drops below 10 the pond reverts to its working Fishpond state and the frogs depart. Water Draw: Drag a water container in to fill it with unsafe water (boil before drinking). Winter: The pond freezes when winter sets in and only ice fishing is available.
水力锯木厂: 种群： 狗鱼、鲈鱼和小鱼继续以相同的缓慢速度增长。 鳟鱼/鲑鱼/鲟鱼： 各自单独追踪（上限各10条）。不繁殖。 捕捞： 用标枪每次捕捞一条鱼。每次捕捞使该物种数量减少1。 青蛙： 鱼塘处于满载状态时可执行捕捉青蛙操作（无需标枪）。 还原： 繁殖种群（狗鱼+鲈鱼+小鱼）降至10条以下时，鱼塘恢复为普通鱼塘状态，青蛙离开。 取水： 拖入水容器以汲取不安全的水（饮用前需煮沸）。 冬季： 冬季来临时鱼塘结冰，只能冰钓。

水力锯木厂: 用标枪从鱼塘捕捞一条狗鱼。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Spear a perch from the pond.
水力锯木厂: 用标枪从鱼塘捕捞一条鲈鱼。

水力锯木厂: 用手从鱼塘边缘捕捉青蛙。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Draw unsafe water from the pond into a container. Boil before drinking.
水力锯木厂: 从鱼塘汲取不安全的水装入容器。饮用前需煮沸。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Abandon the fish and drain the pond back to a fishpond kit.
水力锯木厂: 放弃鱼群，将鱼塘排水还原为鱼塘套件。

Water-Driven Sawmill: The fishpond is frozen over. The fish remain under the ice but no longer grow until spring. Only ice fishing is possible.
水力锯木厂: 鱼塘已结冰。鱼仍在冰下但在春天前不再生长。只能进行冰钓。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Populations: Pike, perch, and minnow are preserved beneath the ice (no growth until thaw). Trout, char, and sturgeon are tracked separately and preserved across the freeze. Ice Fish: Each ice fishing action takes longer than open water and requires a spear. Water Draw: Disabled while frozen. Thaw: The pond returns to its working state automatically when winter ends. Population is preserved across the freeze.
水力锯木厂: 种群： 狗鱼、鲈鱼和小鱼被保存在冰下（解冻前不再生长）。鳟鱼、鲑鱼和鲟鱼单独追踪，冰封期间得以保存。 冰钓： 每次冰钓比开放水域耗时更长，需要标枪。 取水： 结冰期间禁用。 解冻： 冬季结束时鱼塘自动恢复工作状态。种群在冰封期间得以保存。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Spear a pike through the ice.
水力锯木厂: 穿冰用标枪捕捞一条狗鱼。

水力锯木厂: 穿冰用标枪捕捞一条鲈鱼。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Build a mill race outlet at any outdoor location (1 hour). Requires a Mill Race, which is consumed in construction. Once built, provides a steady source of unclean water. Freezes solid in winter.

水力锯木厂: 可安装在任意户外地点的便携式引水渠出口。

水力锯木厂: 在当前户外地点安装引水渠出口。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Pack up the workshop back into a transportable kit.

水力锯木厂: 将工坊库存中的六块铜块锤打成一张铜片。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Forge six copper nuggets from the workshop inventory into six copper nails.
水力锯木厂: 将工坊库存中的六块铜块锻造成六枚铜钉。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Pour four copper nuggets from the workshop inventory into a mold to cast one unfinished metal lump.
水力锯木厂: 将工坊库存中的四块铜块浇入模具铸造一个未成形金属块。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Place the workshop kit into the environment.
水力锯木厂: 将工坊套件放置在环境中。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Place: Install the outlet outdoors to provide a steady flow of unclean water. Dismantle: Break it down to recover all materials.
水力锯木厂: 放置： 在户外安装出口以持续提供不洁净水流。 拆除： 拆解以回收所有材料。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Fill containers: Drag an empty water container onto the outlet to draw unclean water. Winter: The outlet freezes in winter — no water can be drawn until the spring thaw. Pack Up: Recover the mill race outlet as a portable item for relocation.
水力锯木厂: 装水： 将空水容器拖至出口汲取不洁净的水。 冬季： 出口在冬天结冰——春天解冻前无法取水。 收起： 将引水渠出口收回为便携物品以便迁移。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Frozen: No water can be drawn during winter. Copper Brazier: A lit Copper Brazier placed in this area provides enough heat to keep the machinery running, even while the outlet is frozen. Spring thaw: The outlet automatically resumes when winter ends. Pack Up: Recover the outlet as a portable item for relocation even when frozen.
水力锯木厂: 冰封： 冬季无法取水。 铜制火盆： 在此区域放置一个点燃的铜制火盆可提供足够热量维持机械运转，即使出口已冰封。 春季解冻： 冬季结束时出口自动恢复。 收起： 即使冰封时也可将出口收回为便携物品以便迁移。

Water-Driven Sawmill: Requirements: Requires mill race access for water power. Water-powered actions stop when water is frozen in winter. Operation: Drag firewood or charcoal onto the workshop forge to feed fuel, then light it with embers. The forge naturally heats to about 1000. Use Blast when water is flowing, or drag Bellows onto the lit forge by hand, to push the temperature high enough for smelting. Place heated metal tool blanks or copper parts in the inventory, then press Hammer All to apply one water-hammer strike to each item while water is flowing. The workshop hammer improves metal quality while shaping tools. Accepts: All heated tool blanks, heated lump of metal, copper gear parts, and any item tagged Heatable or Copper.
水力锯木厂: 需求： 需要引水渠提供水力。冬季水流冻结时，水力动作会停止。 操作： 将柴火或木炭拖至工坊锻炉补充燃料，然后用余烬点火。锻炉会自然升温至约1000。水流畅通时可使用鼓风，或手动将风箱拖到已点燃的锻炉上，将温度推高到足以冶炼。将加热的金属工具坯料或铜零件放入库存，然后在水流畅通时按全部锤打对每件物品施加一次水力锤击。工坊锻锤在塑形工具时提升金属品质。 接受： 所有加热工具坯料、加热金属块、铜齿轮零件，以及任何带有可加热或铜标签的物品。

Water-Driven Sawmill: A small cast copper gear used in water-driven machinery. Can be smelted back into copper nuggets.

A large cast copper gear used in water-driven machinery. Can be smelted back into copper nuggets.
Purpose: Component for water-driven machinery. Used in: Sawmills, workshops, and other water-powered devices.
A large cast copper saw blade for use in a water-driven sawmill. Can be smelted back into copper nuggets.
Purpose: Cutting component for the water-driven sawmill.
A set of heavy wrought iron fittings for reinforcing water-driven machinery.
Purpose: Reinforcement component for advanced water-driven machinery. Used in: Water-driven sawmill, forge, and workshop kits.
A wrought iron bearing for supporting the heavy rotating shaft of a water-driven workshop.
Purpose: Rotating support component for advanced water-driven machinery. Used in: Water-driven sawmill, forge, grinding mill, ore sluice, and workshop kits.
A wrought iron axle for transferring rotation through heavy water-driven machinery.
Purpose: Drive-shaft component for advanced water-driven machinery. Used in: Water-driven sawmill, forge, grinding mill, ore sluice, and workshop kits.
Cast a small copper gear in a mud-brick and clay mold using a small crucible of molten copper, then break it open with a hammer.
Small Crucible of Molten Copper Needed
Cast a large copper gear in a mud-brick and clay mold using a large crucible of molten copper, then break it open with a hammer.
Large Crucible of Molten Copper Needed
Cast a copper saw blade in a clay mold using two large crucibles of molten copper, then break it open with a hammer.
Large Crucible of Molten Copper Needed
Forge two iron parts from one iron bar.

Forge one heavy iron axle from a wrought iron bar.
